title: Operations Board Row
description: Single row in the operations board feed: detected issue → proposed fix → PR → merged → impact

signal_id.description: Production signal that failed or was fixed

status.description: Stage in the chain: detected → fix_proposed → pr_opened → merged → impact_recorded

suggested_fix.description: Human or agent-proposed fix (e.g. from systems test)

merged.description: Whether the fix PR was merged

impact.description: Before/after or pass/fail outcome (e.g. signal X went from fail to pass)

ts.description: ISO 8601 UTC (alias or in addition to timestamp)

source.description: Agent or component: detector_agent, section_scoring, governance_agent, pr_agent

evidence_path.description: Path to artifact or run URL
